entry.title: New: BILL039(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO BUILDING PERMITS.

Clarifies that all documents and information required in support of a building permit application be submitted concurrently with the building permit application. Requires that the building permit application include the name, license number, and address of all contractors, subcontractors, and specialty contractors involved in the project, or identify the project as an owner-builder project, if applicable. Requires building permit applications to state the name, address, license number, and phases of work to be performed by all contractors, subcontractors, and specialty contractors engaged to perform electrical or plumbing work on the project and a signature by the responsible managing employee or authorized employee of each contractor, subcontractor, and specialty contractor so designated/stated. Removes the requirements that building permit applicants submit an affidavit that: (1) demonstrates that a majority of the owners of a property concur with the demolition of a building; and (2) affirms compliance...

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
